title: Authenticate before SCHC destination inspection
description: RplStack::wire_is_for_local decompresses an untrusted SCHC payload before LinkLayer::receive_frame verifies the signed frame. This permits forged signed-bit traffic to exercise SCHC decompression pre-authentication. Simply calling receive_frame first is unsafe because it would commit replay state for valid overheard frames. Add a verify-without-replay-commit path (or equivalent two-phase authenticated destination filtering), then commit replay state only for accepted local traffic. Discovered during frozen convergence reconciliation review; implementation is outside the fixed commit ledger and must be deferred from project-LICHEN-7fqg.2.
